parsed.simulated_user_message: I keep thinking that if I don’t get top grades, I’m a failure and that’s the only way my parents will see me as worthy. And because of that, the idea of being enough feels impossible—my worth feels tied to numbers and their approval. It’s exhausting to keep chasing perfection and never feel like I’m enough, no matter what I do.
